title: Registration & Welcome Coffee
desc: Check in, collect your badge, and connect with fellow delegates over coffee and light refreshments.

title: Official Welcome & Opening Address
desc: A warm welcome from the World CX Summit organising team, setting the tone for a day of insight, connection and inspiration.
speaker: Summit Host

title: The CX Revolution — Where Are We Really Headed?
desc: An incisive opening keynote examining the forces reshaping customer experience in 2026 — AI, hyper-personalisation, and the rising expectations of India's next billion consumers.
speaker: TBA

title: AI-First CX — Moving from Tool to Organisational Strategy
desc: How leading enterprises are embedding AI not as a point solution but as the operating system of their customer experience — and what it takes to get there.
speaker: TBA

title: Networking & Refreshment Break
desc: Visit sponsor booths and explore the exhibition area.

title: Hyper-Personalisation at Scale — From Vision to Measurable Impact
desc: Senior CX leaders from e-commerce, banking and healthcare share how they are delivering truly individual experiences to millions of customers without sacrificing efficiency or trust.
speaker: Panel of 4 Industry Leaders

title: Fireside Chat: Building Customer Trust in the Age of AI
desc: A candid conversation on data ethics, transparency in automated decisions, and how brands can maintain emotional loyalty when technology drives every interaction.
speaker: TBA

title: Networking Lunch
desc: Curated roundtable lunches — join a topic table that matches your biggest CX challenge.

title: Omnichannel in Mobile-First India — WhatsApp, App, Web & Beyond
desc: How India's leading consumer brands are stitching together WhatsApp, app, web and in-store journeys into a seamless experience for a mobile-native audience.
speaker: Panel of 4 Industry Leaders

title: Proactive & Predictive Service — Solving Problems Before They Happen
desc: Using data signals, ML models and behavioural analytics to anticipate customer needs and deliver resolutions before the customer even reaches out.
speaker: TBA

title: Networking & Refreshment Break
desc: Explore the exhibition floor and engage with technology partners.

title: Human + AI — Defining the Irreplaceable Role of Empathy in CX
desc: Where does automation end and human connection begin? A thought-provoking panel on designing the right handoffs, preserving empathy at scale, and what customers really want.
speaker: Panel of 4 Industry Leaders

title: Fireside Chat: Digital Workflows & the Customer-Centric Enterprise
desc: How a leading enterprise rewired its internal operations — from back-office to frontline — to put the customer at the centre of every process decision.
speaker: TBA

title: Closing Keynote: The CX Leader of Tomorrow
desc: A rallying call on the mindset, skills and bold bets that will define the next generation of customer experience leadership.
speaker: TBA

title: World CX Awards Ceremony 2026
desc: Celebrating excellence in customer experience across 20+ categories — recognising the brands, teams and individuals who set the benchmark in 2025–26.

title: Networking Reception
desc: An evening of celebration, connections and conversation — raise a toast to the day's insights and the award winners.
